-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hello, Stefan.

	This issue has been fixed in the new port version (1.4.2). If someone
could close this PR that would be great.

Thanks!
Janky Jay, III

Stefan Walter wrote:
> Dear maintainer of sysutils/syscp,
> 
> a problem report has been submitted for your port for which your 
> feedback might be required; its contents can be found at [1]. If it 
> contains a patch or suggestions for a change, please send a followup to 
> the PR explaining whether or not you approve it and want it to be 
> committed.
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
> 
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/125960
